---
title: "Animating Human Faces Using Modified Waters Muscle Model"
author:
  - name: Peter Kapec
  - name: Peter Drahoš
date: "2004-04-01"
categories: [conference paper]
citation:
  type: paper-conference
  container-title: "CESCG 2004: 8th Central European Seminar on Computer Graphics"
  publisher: "Institute of Computer Graphics and Algorithms, Vienna University of Technology"
  page: "141-148"
---
